quote: To be, or not to be, that is the question.
author: William Shakespeare

quote: Genius is 1% inspiration and 99% perspiration.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: As soon as you trust yourself, you will know how to live.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quote: We become what we think about.
author: Earl Nightingale

quote: Don't let the noise of others' opinions drown out your own inner voice.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Peace begins with a smile.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Yesterday is but today's memory, and tomorrow is today's dream.
author: Khalil Gibran

quote: In the end, it's not how you lived, but how you loved.
author: Anonymous

quote: It is not the strongest of the species that survive, nor the most intelligent, but the one most responsive to change.
author: Charles Darwin

quote: I will either find a way, or make one.
author: Hannibal

quote: All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them.
author: Walt Disney

quote: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: It is in your moments of decision that your destiny is shaped.
author: Tony Robbins

quote: Happiness doesn't depend on what you have or who you are, it solely relies on what you think.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: If you want to live your life to the absolute fullest, live in the present.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quote: All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quote: Success is 99% failure.
author: Soichiro Honda

quote: People are the castle, people are the stone walls, people are the moat.
author: Shingen Takeda

quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: There is more to life than increasing its speed.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Life is 10% what happens to you and 90% how you react to it.
author: Charles R. Swindoll

quote: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Thoughts become things.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: Small changes make a big difference.
author: Anonymous

quote: Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Nothing great in the world has ever been accomplished without passion.
author: Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel

quote: Let him who would move the world first move himself.
author: Socrates

quote: Knowing is not enough; we must apply.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: It is better to light a candle than curse the darkness.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Rock bottom became the solid foundation on which I rebuilt my life.
author: J.K. Rowling

quote: Nothing is impossible, the word itself says 'I'm possible'!
author: Audrey Hepburn

quote: If today were the last day of my life, would I want to do what I am about to do today?
author: Steve Jobs

quote: The secret to enjoying life is to stop being ordinary.
author: Anonymous

quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Socrates

quote: Success is stumbling from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: If you want to be happy, be.
author: Leo Tolstoy

quote: It is only with the heart that one can see rightly; what is essential is invisible to the eye.
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quote: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Taking the first step is the beginning of everything.
author: Anonymous

quote: Wise men learn more from fools than fools from the wise.
author: Cato the Elder

quote: A life without purpose is like a ship without a rudder.
author: Anonymous

quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

quote: Difficulties make you stronger.
author: Anonymous

quote: Laughter is the shortest distance between two people.
author: Victor Borge

quote: We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Today is the first day of the rest of your life.
author: Charles Dederich

quote: It is not important to be better than someone else, but to be better than yesterday.
author: Jigoro Kano

quote: Adversity makes men wise.
author: Euripides

quote: Love does not consist in gazing at each other, but in looking outward together in the same direction.
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quote: Life is what we make it, always has been, always will be.
author: Grandma Moses

quote: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
author: Buddha

quote: I learned that courage was not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: I will prepare and some day my chance will come.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: Believe in your own value. Otherwise, no one else will.
author: Anonymous

quote: The starting point of all achievement is desire.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: To accomplish great things, we must not only act, but also dream.
author: Anatole France

quote: Even the darkest night will end and the sun will rise.
author: Victor Hugo

quote: Being yourself is one of the bravest things you can do.
author: Anonymous

quote: True love begins when nothing is looked for in return.
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quote: What you want to achieve is already present within you as a seed.
author: Anonymous

quote: Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet.
author: Jean-Jacques Rousseau

quote: Doing good to others is doing good to yourself.
author: Anonymous

quote: Reading is thinking with someone else's head instead of one's own.
author: Arthur Schopenhauer

quote: Experience is simply the name we give our mistakes.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: To live a happy life, you need a little courage, a little knowledge, and a little imagination.
author: Charlie Chaplin

quote: Kindness is the language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
author: Mark Twain

quote: An ordinary day is actually the greatest treasure.
author: Anonymous

quote: What is necessary to make dreams come true is not talent, but the power to continue.
author: Anonymous

quote: Have the space to laugh at yourself, especially in difficult situations.
author: Anonymous

quote: Anyone who stops learning is old, whether at twenty or eighty.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Shine your light. It might be a beacon for someone else.
author: Anonymous

quote: Self-trust is the first secret of success.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Life is like a short story. What matters is not its length, but its content.
author: Seneca

quote: There is no greater happiness than being needed by someone.
author: Anonymous

quote: Never forget gratitude. It is the source of all abundance.
author: Anonymous

quote: Cherish this moment. It creates your future.
author: Anonymous

quote: Boys, be ambitious.
author: William S. Clark

quote: Without passion, nothing starts.
author: Anonymous

quote: You only live once. You lose if you don't enjoy it.
author: Anonymous

quote: It is never too late to try.
author: Anonymous

quote: Treasure every encounter, for it will never recur.
author: Sen no Rikyu

quote: Continuity is power.
author: Anonymous

quote: If you try, you can do it. If you don't, you can't.
author: Yozan Uesugi

quote: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: The plan for the day is made in the morning.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Laozi
